title: Seed a deterministic-verifier child bounty
goal: Create a fully funded canonical child bounty for a deterministic verifier or harness improvement that another wallet completes and is paid for.
acceptance_criteria: Post a canonical autonomous-v1 child bounty whose creator is the active solver.
Fully fund the child to at least the parent solver reward; pooled contributors are allowed.
Bind the child benchmark to the parent bounty ID and round and use an explicit deterministic verifier.
Have a different wallet complete the child and receive canonical settlement before the parent verification deadline.

verification_policy.rubric: The immutable verifier reads canonical parent and child state. It passes only after the active parent solver creates and fully funds a parent-bound child that a different wallet completes and receives canonical settlement for before the parent expires.
